task: We want to make a few tweaks to file picker we want to change how this works fundamentally \

steps.instruction: Read the file picker implementation to understand how it currently works. Examine src/tui/mod.rs for FilePickerState struct, filtered, gather_files, and walk_dir functions. Also read src/tui/overlays.rs for draw_file_picker function. Note the current behavior, filtering logic, file collection approach, and any configuration options.
